Notes:
1. Fabrication of structural steel includes cutting, riveting, burning, drilling, milling, fitting, assembling,
welding, bolting, storing, loading, and hauling to the job site.
2. Man-hour units are based on bolted connection. If sections are to be welded, use 1.25 multiplier for
welded joint preparation.
